description: Regression evals for the keyword-compare atom. Each case maps to a failure mode or regression case in MAINTAINER_README.md.

cases.label: Single keyword, all platforms, no season or momentum
cases.description: Minimal input: one keyword, defaults to all four platforms, no season or trend check. All seasonal_relevance and momentum fields must be null.

cases.label: 10 keywords, 2 platforms, fall season
cases.description: Full 10-keyword list against YouTube and Pinterest with season=fall. All cells must have seasonal_relevance populated. universal_keywords and platform_exclusive_opportunities must be non-null.

keywords: how to style a mantel for fall

cases.label: Input truncation — 11 keywords supplied
cases.description: 11 keywords provided. Only 10 should be analyzed. The 11th must appear in retrieval_gaps with a truncation note.

cases.label: Trend momentum enabled — 3 keywords x 3 platforms = 9 cells (under warning threshold)
cases.description: check_trend_momentum: true with 9 total cells. No warning should be emitted. Momentum must be populated (never null) on all cells.

cases.label: Trend momentum enabled — 6 keywords x 4 platforms = 24 cells (above warning threshold)
cases.description: check_trend_momentum: true with 24 total cells. Warning must appear. Some momentum values may be unknown if retrieval times out.

cases.label: All keywords produce platform_specific verdict — no universal keywords
cases.description: Highly platform-specific keywords (TikTok audio trend terms) where no keyword achieves strong fit on 3+ platforms. universal_keywords must be empty, not null.

cases.label: Navigational intent on TikTok — serp_feature not_applicable
cases.description: A brand-name keyword with navigational intent run against TikTok. The TikTok cell must have serp_feature: not_applicable and still provide an actionable recommendation.

eval_run_notes: Run manually by invoking keyword-compare with each input and verifying all expected fields against output JSON. Momentum fields require live retrieval for eval-004 and eval-005 — run those in a session with web-intel-engine available.
